title: Ice Cream Wars
short_description: A madcap arcade driving game in the unexpectedly cut-throat world of frozen confectionary distribution.
description:
A madcap arcade driving game in the unexpectedly cut-throat world of the frozen confectionary distribution industry.

Race against the clock (and Gelatony's henchmen) to provide the residents of Rippleton with the sweet frozen treats they're craving.
